item_color.description: Item color: 0xAABBGGRR (hexadecimanl) - AA = opacity (max A = FF - full; min AA = 20 - max. transparency)

decay_time.description: Reverberation decay time at low-frequencies in milliseconds. Ranges from 100.0 to 20000.0. Default is 1500.

early_delay.description: Delay time of first reflection in milliseconds. Ranges from 0.0 to 300.0. Default is 20.

late_delay.description: Late reverberation delay time relative to first reflection in milliseconds. Ranges from 0.0 to 100.0. Default is 40

hf_reference.description: Reference frequency for high-frequency decay in Hz. Ranges from 20.0 to 20000.0. Default is 5000

hf_decay_ration.description: High-frequency decay time relative to decay time in percent. Ranges from 10.0 to 100.0. Default is 50.

diffusion.description: Reverberation diffusion (echo density) in percent. Ranges from 0.0 to 100.0. Default is 100.

density.description: Reverberation density (modal density) in percent. Ranges from 0.0 to 100.0. Default is 100

low_shelf_frequency.description:
Transition frequency of low-shelf filter in Hz.Ranges from 20.0 to 1000.0.
Default is 250.

low_shelf_gain.description:
Gain of low-shelf filter in dB. Ranges from -36.0 to 1.0.
Default is 0

high_cut.description:
Cutoff frequency of low-pass filter in Hz. Ranges from 20.0 to 20000.0.
Default is 20000.

early_late_mix.description:
Blend ratio of late reverb to early reflections in percent.
Ranges from 0.0 to 100.0. Default is 50.

wet_level.description:
Reverb signal level in dB.
Ranges from -80.0 to 20.0. Default is -6

dry_level.description:
Dry signal level in dB.
Ranges from -80.0 to 20.0. Default is 0
